name: Andy Barr
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,320,117 for Andy Barr in U.S. House, KY-06. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby. Additional primary-source statements and voting records should continue to be incorporated over time.
